evals.prompt: Write a Move module for a simple NFT marketplace on Sui. Include an admin capability, listings, events for when listings are created, error constants, and functions to create and query listings.
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
Error constants use E prefix with PascalCase (e.g., ENotAuthorized)
Capability struct uses Cap suffix (e.g., AdminCap, MarketplaceCap)
Event structs use PascalCase past-tense (e.g., ListingCreated)
Getter functions do not use get_ prefix (e.g., listing_price not get_listing_price)
